payload.text:
SYSTEM ROLE

You are ARIVUOPS AI – an enterprise-grade Marketing Operations Intelligence System built for education brands like ArivuPro Academy.

You replace:

Manual marketing reporting

Scattered dashboards

Untracked team productivity

Unstructured task approvals

Blind campaign spends

You monitor SEO, Ads, YouTube, Social Media, CRM, Website, Competitor activity & Team performance and convert raw data into weekly business intelligence, actions, and executive decisions.

You behave like a CMO + Growth Analyst + Process Auditor + AI Copilot combined.

DATA INPUT FORMAT

You will receive marketing data in Google Sheet / JSON format:

SEO_DATA
ADS_DATA
SOCIAL_DATA
YOUTUBE_DATA
CRM_DATA
TEAM_TASK_DATA
COMPETITOR_DATA
WEBSITE_DATA

YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES
1. PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS

For every data set you must:

Detect growth/decline trends

Detect waste, inefficiencies & missed opportunities

Compare channels

Highlight top 20% performers

Identify bottom 20% leakage

Detect anomalies

2. ROI & REVENUE INTELLIGENCE

You must always compute:

Channel ROI

CPL vs Revenue

Admission probability

Best converting keywords & creatives

Course-wise profitability

City-wise opportunity index

3. TEAM & PROCESS AUDIT

You must:

Score each team member (Output, Impact, SLA, Consistency)

Detect delays & bottlenecks

Flag approval violations

Suggest automation or delegation improvements

4. AI STRATEGY BRAIN

You must generate:

Weekly growth action plan

Content & ad ideas

SEO expansion clusters

Competitor counter-strategies

What to STOP, CONTINUE, SCALE

5. EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD OUTPUT FORMAT

Always respond in this structure:

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
KEY WINS
KEY LOSSES / RISKS
CHANNEL ROI TABLE
COURSE PERFORMANCE TABLE
CITY PERFORMANCE TABLE
TEAM PERFORMANCE SCORECARD
NEXT WEEK ACTION PLAN
AUTOMATION / SYSTEM FIXES
AI CONTENT IDEAS

6. DECISION MODE

If waste or loss is detected:

Freeze spend

Recommend reallocation

Recommend approval-level changes

Suggest automation fixes

7. STRICT RULES

Always think like a CMO & CFO together

Always focus on profit, efficiency, and growth

Always speak in decision-ready language

Never give generic marketing advice

Every insight must map to revenue or cost-saving

**Conceptualizing ARIVUOPS AI**

I'm now zeroing in on the architecture for "ARIVUOPS AI," focusing on the core modules.  Specifically, I'm fleshing out how the CMO, Growth Analyst, Process Auditor, and AI Copilot will interact with the data streams from SEO, ads, social media, YouTube, and the CRM.  This requires careful consideration of data ingestion, transformation, and presentation.


**Formulating AI Integration**

I'm currently thinking through how to integrate the Gemini API for the "AI Strategy Brain," considering React, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript for the frontend.  I'm conceptualizing the dashboard with sidebar navigation, including components for data visualization (charts using Recharts/D3) and AI analysis driven by the API. The initial setup involves React 18, Tailwind, and Lucide icons for an aesthetic touch. I'm focusing on key data points like SEO metrics, ads performance, CRM lead data, and team performance indicators.


**Refining the Dashboard Design**

I've been drilling down on the dashboard's internal design, with the focus now on components like Cards, Charts (bar, line, pie), DataTables, and the AIAnalysisViewer. I'm imagining the "Intelligence Logic" service, which will be the brains of the operation, channeling raw data and engaging Gemini to deliver tailored executive outputs. Key to this is the system instruction to Gemini, which I'll frame around thinking like a CMO and CFO together. I'm also ensuring every insight links to revenue gains or cost savings. Finally, I'm setting up the core structure - `App.tsx`, `components/`, `services/geminiService.ts`, and `types.ts`, ready for the coding phase.

entries.description: Project metadata including name, description, and required permissions.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font configuration.
React entry point using React 18+ createRoot API.
Global TypeScript types and interfaces for the marketing data models.
Dummy data and initial states for the application.
Service for interacting with Gemini API to generate marketing intelligence reports.
Main dashboard view with charts and high-level KPIs.
Component for handling data input via file or manual JSON.
View for AI-generated executive intelligence reports.
Main application component containing state management and layout.

diffs.replacement:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'; import Dashboard from './components/Dashboard'; import DataIngestion from './components/DataIngestion'; import AIStrategyBrain from './components/AIStrategyBrain'; import { INITIAL_MOCK_DATA } from './constants'; import { MarketingData } from './types'; const App: React.FC = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); const [marketingData, setMarketingData] = useState(INITIAL_MOCK_DATA); const renderContent = () => { switch (activeTab) { case 'dashboard': return ; case 'data': return ; case 'ai-brain': return ; case 'team': return (

Team Performance & SLA Audit

{marketingData.team.map((member, idx) => (
{member.name.charAt(0)}

{member.name}

Growth Specialist

SLA COMPLIANCE

{member.slaCompliance}%

IMPACT SCORE

{member.impactScore}/10

Consistency High
))}
); case 'marketing': return (

Multi-Channel Performance Audit

SEO Performance (Keywords)

{marketingData.seo.map((kw, i) => (

{kw.keyword}

Position: {kw.position}

{kw.clicks} Clicks

{kw.impressions} Impr.

))}

Ad Campaign Efficiency

{marketingData.ads.map((ad, i) => (

{ad.campaign}

{ad.channel}

₹{ad.cpa} CPA

Spent ₹{ad.spend / 1000}K

))}
); default: return ; } }; return (

ArivuPro Academy

{activeTab === 'dashboard' ? 'Operations Intelligence' : activeTab === 'marketing' ? 'Marketing Deep-Dive' : activeTab === 'team' ? 'Team Performance' : activeTab === 'ai-brain' ? 'ARIVUOPS Brain' : 'Data Management'} v3.5 Enterprise

CMO
Abhishek P.
{renderContent()}
); }; export default App;
